securityPanel.title: Security & Privacy
securityPanel.description: Security audit based on manifest.json: CSP, permissions and web-accessible resources.

csp.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
csp.note: This is declared in the manifest and can't be changed at runtime via UI.
csp.missing: (CSP unavailable: not in extension context or not explicitly declared in manifest)

installTimeWebAccess.title: Install-time website access
installTimeWebAccess.description: Normal website access only uses fixed http://*/* and https://*/* declarations in the manifest. There is no runtime website-access prompt or removal entry.
installTimeWebAccess.missing: Normal website access missing from manifest

webAccessibleResources.title: Web Accessible Resources
webAccessibleResources.description: The following resources are explicitly declared as web-accessible in manifest.json:

credentials.title: Credential Storage
credentials.modelApiKeyDesc: Stored in chrome.storage.local (not exposed to web pages).

networkTips.title: Network Tips
networkTips.allUrls: Technology-stack detection, browser context, and page tools only cover normal http/https pages. Internal pages, extension pages, about:, and file: are not collectable by default.
networkTips.audit: For external channels like MCP/sync, consider enabling audit logs (coming later).
